remarks: Live the way you want at NV @ Harbor Point, where location, community, and quality of living all come together! Take advantage of luxury living with a 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom apartment for rent. This spacious floor plan, providing natural light throughout, is perfect for those seeking more space to live and work at home. The residence offers ample closet space. NV @ Harbor Point offers beautifully appointed finishes and stainless-steel appliances, including a dishwasher, gas range/stove, in-unit full size washer and dryer. Experience resort-style living with 24- hour concierge, gym with cutting-edge cardio and weight-training equipment, swimming pool, outdoor fire pits, around the clock workspace, covered parking, shuttle to train, complimentary water taxi and more. Direct access to public parks, marinas, boardwalk, restaurants offering al fresco dining and 200+ events planned year-round, including everything from yoga on the boardwalk and 5K races to farmers markets, seasonal pop-ups and more.... 16 month lease.
